payload.issue_title: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable on coupon checkout

similar_fixes.title: TypeError in coupon handler
similar_fixes.root_cause: Null value passed into dict lookup without default fallback in coupons.py

similar_fixes.title: TypeError in coupon handler
similar_fixes.root_cause: Null value passed into dict lookup without default fallback in coupons.py

hypotheses.description: TypeError due to dictionary access with None / missing key when loading discounts
hypotheses.reasoning: The issue indicates a TypeError when applying discount codes. If code is invalid or missing, the value is returned as None, and attempting dictionary index lookups on None causes a TypeError.

hypotheses.description: TypeError in discount rate parsing due to string input from config database
hypotheses.reasoning: The discount code value is retrieved as a string (e.g. '10%') instead of float, causing math operation failures.

rca_report.origin_issue: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable on coupon checkout
rca_report.selected_hypothesis: TypeError due to dictionary access with None / missing key when loading discounts
evidence: payment_processor.py invokes get_coupon_map(code)
Coupon dictionary load returns None for invalid keys
Code accesses index ['value'] on a potential NoneType reference

test_results.log:
FAILURES ===================================
_______________________ test_invalid_coupon_type_error ________________________

    def test_invalid_coupon_type_error():
        processor = PaymentProcessor()
        # Invalid coupon should return 0 discount instead of throwing TypeError
>       res = processor.process_order(30.0, 1, "INVALIDCODE")
              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

test_payment.py:34: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
payment_processor.py:42: in process_order
    discount = self.apply_discount(discount_code)
               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

self = <payment_processor.PaymentProcessor object at 0x000002219FD1E630>
code = 'INVALIDCODE'

    def apply_discount(self, code: str) -> float:
        # Bug 3: TypeError
        # If code is invalid or expired, get_coupon_map returns None.
        # Accessing ['value'] on None raises a TypeError.
>       discount_val = self.get_coupon_map(code)['value']
                       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
E       TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable

rca_report.origin_issue: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable on coupon checkout
rca_report.selected_hypothesis: TypeError due to dictionary access with None / missing key when loading discounts

similar_fixes.title: TypeError in coupon handler
similar_fixes.root_cause: Null value passed into dict lookup without default fallback in coupons.py

hypotheses.description: TypeError due to dictionary access with None / missing key when loading discounts
hypotheses.reasoning: The issue indicates a TypeError when applying discount codes. If code is invalid or missing, the value is returned as None, and attempting dictionary index lookups on None causes a TypeError.

hypotheses.description: TypeError in discount rate parsing due to string input from config database
hypotheses.reasoning: The discount code value is retrieved as a string (e.g. '10%') instead of float, causing math operation failures.
